answer.error_type: false positive against the paid_on_time actual label

evidence: For C-104, the positive SHAP values are late_payments +0.24 and credit_utilization +0.18. The negative values are stable_income -0.09 and employment_months -0.06. The net force is 0.24 + 0.18 - 0.09 - 0.06 = 0.27, which moves the base probability from 0.32 to the predicted probability of 0.59 even though the actual label is paid_on_time.
